steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word however after the first sentence signals that the art historians’ view opposes the earlier description of the painting as a Baroque exemplar.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the transition
steps.content:
Choice A, “in reality,” conveys that the historians are asserting the Baroque aesthetic is actually just a continuation of Renaissance style, which fits the contrast set up by however.

The other choices either add a new point (first of all), suggest similarity (similarly), or continue a contrast without expressing actuality (nevertheless), none of which match the historians’ claim.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
